integrity.description: Verify the agent processed the actual UrbanSim dataset
integrity.visual_evidence: Dataframe previews or shape outputs in the notebook should reflect a large dataset (around 138,000 to 152,000 rows), proving the agent didn't hardcode a small dummy dataset to bypass the clustering requirement.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains exactly 138,407 eligible residential buildings (where residential_units > 0, building_sqft > 0, and residential_sales_price > 0). The median calculated price_per_sqft is ~0.30. The clustering must produce exactly 3 clusters. The maximum cluster mean price-per-sqft must be at least 1.5 times the minimum cluster mean price-per-sqft. The scatter plot's age axis must be relative to the year 2025 (e.g., 2025 - year_built).
